title: Chromatin immunoprecipitation (ChIP) in 22Rv1 cells
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"708mg","text":"This protocol describes chromatin immunoprecipitation (ChIP) in 22Rv1 cells with or without CHD9 knockdown, followed by DNA purification and ChIP-seq library preparation.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"fhkd8","text":"All buffers should be freshly prepared or thawed on ice.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8ceo7","text":"Add protease inhibitor to lysis buffers immediately before use.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fbaqv","text":"Perform all steps on ice or at 4°C unless otherwise indicated.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c3o07","text":"Pre-chill centrifuges, rotators, and sonicator to 4°C.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"djlqn","text":"Use low-retention, DNA-free tubes and tips.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Add formaldehyde to a final concentration of 1%, and incubate for 10 min at room temperature.
Quench crosslinking by adding glycine to a final concentration of 125 mM.
Pellet cells and wash twice with cold PBS, and then discard supernatant completely.
Resuspend cell pellet in 300 µL modified RIPA buffer supplemented with protease inhibitor.
Sonicate chromatin using a Bioruptor (Diagenode) at 4°C: 18 cycles 30 s ON / 30 s OFF
Briefly centrifuge to remove insoluble debris and transfer supernatant to a new tube.
Add 40 µL protein A/G beads to the sonicated chromatin. Incubate with rotation at 4°C . Transfer the pre-cleared chromatin to a new tube.
For each ChIP, prepare antibody-coated beads: 5 µg antibody 11 µL Protein A beads 11 µL Protein G beads Incubate with rotation at 4°C for at least 6 h .
Combine pre-cleared chromatin with antibody-coated beads. Incubate overnight at 4°C with rotation.

Wash beads at 4°C , rotating for 5 min per wash: Once with 0.5 mL modified RIPA buffer Once with 0.5 mL high-salt modified RIPA buffer (500 mM NaCl) Once with 0.5 mL LiCl buffer Twice with 0.5 mL TE buffer (pH 8) Between washes, collect beads and carefully remove supernatant.
Resuspend beads in 100 µL decrosslinking buffer. Add 1 µL RNase A. Incubate at 37°C for 30 min with shaking.
Add 2 µL Proteinase K. Incubate at 55°C for 30 min with shaking.
Reverse crosslinks by incubating at 65°C overnight with shaking.
Purify DNA using the QIAGEN PCR purification kit (28004) according to the manufacturer’s instructions. Elute purified ChIP DNA in nuclease-free water or elution buffer.
Use purified DNA for Illumina ChIP-seq library construction with the ThruPLEX DNA-seq kit (Takara, R400676) following the manufacturer’s protocol.
NOTE: Sonication conditions may require optimization depending on cell density and instrument performance.
creator: Xin Xu
